title: Knysna, Western Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Knysna, Western Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Knysna is a city in Western Cape with a population of 76,000. A stunning lagoon-side town on the Garden Route, famous for its oysters, forests, and natural beauty.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
